verses.text: “Lunggulhna tawh nungak khatpeuh ka et ngeilohna ding, kiciamna ka bawlkhin hi
Vanglian Pasian in eite bang hong cih a, mihingte' gamtatna bangci thuhkik ahi hiam
A manloin a gamtate tungah siatna leh gimna a tungsak hi
Pasian in ka gamtatna khempeuh thei a, ka kalsuanna khempeuh a hong mu hi
“Ka gitloh gamtat ngeilohna, kuamah ka khem ngei hetlohna, ka gamtat hoihna thute-ah ka kiciam ngam hi
Pasian in tawikhaina manah hong tawikhai hen; ka paubaan' hetlohna hong mu ding hi
Lampi man panin ka pial a, siatna lam ka zuih a, ka khut tungah mawhna a baan' taak leh
ka khawhsa ante midangte' nek suak hen la, ka an neih khempeuh maimang ta hen
“Ka vengte' zi zawlmitin, a kong gei-ah ngakin ka buk taak leh
ka it ka zi in midangte' an suksak hen la, midangte' ang-ah lum ta hen
(Tua bang mawhna pen a siahuai hi a, sihna a thuak ding ahi hi
Ka neih khempeuh a kangtum thei mei husia tawh a kibang ahi hi
“Ka nasemte khat peuhpeuh kei tungah hong phun ciangin, ama thu ngai-in limtakin ka bawl hi
Tuaci kei leng, Pasian' mai mu ngam ding ka hi hiam? Keima thu a khen dingin Pasian hong pai ciangin bang gen mawk ding ka hi hiam
Kei a hong piangsak Pasian mah in keima nasemte zong a piangsak ahi hi
“Mizawngte ka huh ding ka mangngilh ngei kei a, meigong numeite ka guaksuaksak ngei kei hi
Keimah in an ne napi-in, tagahte a gilkialin ka koihkhong ngei kei hi
Ka khang tawntungin tua bangte ka en tawntung hi
“Mi a cimawh, puan silh ding a lei zolo, a zawng lua ka muh ciangin
ka tuuhon panin ka ngah tuumul puan kibawl ka pia hi. Amah in zong a lungsim neih khempeuh tawh kei a hong phat hi
“Zum thukhenna-ah zo-na ning cih ngaihsutna tawh tagah khatpeuh ka khem taak leh
ka khutte buisum hen la, ka liang bul panin kilongkhia ta hen
Pasian' gimpiak ding kihta ka hih manin, tua bang peuhmah ka gamta ngei kei ding hi
“Leitung hauhna muan' leh suan'in ka nei ngei kei a
ka hauhna zong ka kisaktheihpih ngei kei hi
A taang mahmah ni ahi a, a hoih mahmah kha ahi zongin, cikmahin ka bia ngei kei hi
Tuate pahtawina leh zahtakna limin ka khut lapna tawh cikmah hunin ka khial ngei het kei hi
Tua bang mawhna in sihna a thuak ding hi a, tua bang mawhna pen Vanglian Pasian nialna ahi hi
“Ka galte'n gim a thuak teh ka kipak ngei kei a, haksatna a tuah uh teh ka lungdam ngei kei hi
A sih ding uh deihna tawh ka samsia ngei kei hi
Zin leh leengte limtakin ka do tawntungna thu ka na a hong sepsak mi khempeuh in a thei uh hi
Khualzin mi khempeuh ka inn-ah ka tungsak tawntung a, kongzing lakah amaute ka lumsak ngei kei hi
Midangte in a mawhnate uh pulak loin imcip uh a, ahih hangin keima mawhna cikmahin ka im ngei kei hi
Midangte' hong kam pau ding kihtakin ka nei ngei kei hi. Amau' hong simmawh ding ka kihtakna hangin pauloin ka om ngei kei a, ka bucip ngei kei hi

“Ka thugente kuamah in na ngailo ding ahi hiam? Ka gen thu khempeuh man hi, ci-in ka kiciam hi. Vanglian Pasian in kei hong dawng ta hen. “Ka langte in kei hong mawhsakna thute ka tawi theih dingin lai sungah a kigelh hi leh
tua mawhsaknate kisialhna tawh ka ngawngah ka ok ding a, mi khempeuh in a muh dingin ka sangsak ding hi
Ka gamtatna khempeuh Pasian kiangah ka gen ding a, ama muhna-ah lungdamin kihihsakna tawh ka om ding hi
“Ka khawh leitang ka guk ahih a, a nei taktakpa' tung pan ka suh ahih a
tua leitanga piang ante ka nek a, tua lo a khote a puksi-in ka omsak taak leh
tua lo sungah mangbuh leh mangbuh ham tangin kiak leh ling po ta hen,” a ci hi. Job' thugente beita hi.
